scope.criticalFindings: none obvious (policy gates + fail-closed publish already in place)
scope.implemented: publish double-compile optimization via runSvgPipeline skipCompile

change.summary: After compileSvgForPublish succeeds, publish passes skipCompile+precompiledSvg so S4 only writes disk (no S1–S3 recompile via generate-svg.mjs).
notChanged: POST /api/admin/svg-editor still full runSvgPipeline (single compile; no prior compileSvgForPublish)
